# AI Search Visibility Loop

## Goal

Make the product easier for answer engines and AI-assisted buyers to understand and cite.

## Steps

1. Identify category, use cases, alternatives, pricing questions, security questions, and integration questions.
2. Generate answer-style pages.
3. Add structured comparison sections.
4. Create fact-dense FAQs.
5. Write neutral product descriptions.
6. Monitor how AI/search surfaces describe the product.
7. Update source/claim memory.

## Output

```markdown
# AI Search Visibility Brief

## Query cluster
## Current answer-engine risk
## Missing pages
## Fact blocks to add
## Comparison pages
## Review/proof assets needed
```
